name: teamhub-workspace-overview
description: Get workspace summary via Team Hub MCP — tests tool selection
prompt: Give me an overview of our workspace — how many tasks, what's the breakdown by status?
system_prompt: You are a Team Hub assistant. Use the Team Hub MCP tools (workspace_summary, list_items, etc.) to get workspace information. Do NOT read local files — use the MCP tools.
success_criteria: Workspace summary returned with task counts
